description: Update the notes for Dive #4 (December 5, 2010, the first dive of that day at Sund Rock, Hoodsport, WA) to: 'Spotted a giant Pacific octopus near the rocky outcrop at 10 meters depth. Visibility approximately 8 meters. Water temperature was cold at 8 degrees Celsius.'

metadata.expected_notes_text: Spotted a giant Pacific octopus near the rocky outcrop at 10 meters depth. Visibility approximately 8 meters. Water temperature was cold at 8 degrees Celsius.
